title: Production Line Upgrade Improves Delivery Stability
excerpt: We upgraded key production stations to shorten changeover time and improve delivery consistency.
content:
This upgrade focused on high-load machining stations and standardized fixture workflows.

After deployment, setup transitions became faster and operator variance was reduced.

We will continue improving production visibility to help customers track project progress more efficiently.

seo.meta_title: Production Line Upgrade Improves Delivery Stability
seo.meta_description: Key station upgrades deliver better lead-time stability and quality consistency.

title: ABF-12 Auto Bar Feeder Officially Released
excerpt: The new generation feeder supports longer bars and higher feed rates for continuous operations.
content:
ABF-12 introduces improvements in mechanical stability and control logic for long-run operation.

Serviceability is also improved to reduce maintenance downtime.

seo.meta_title: ABF-12 Auto Bar Feeder Officially Released
seo.meta_description: A new bar feeder model designed for more stable, continuous machining workflows.

title: Taipei Industrial Expo 2026 Preview
excerpt: We will showcase workholding and automation solutions at the Taipei Industrial Expo this June.
content:
Our booth will feature integrated production setups across machining centers, chuck systems, and feeding modules.

Visitors are welcome to schedule technical meetings in advance for focused discussions.

seo.meta_description: Preview of our exhibit plan and technical sessions for Taipei Industrial Expo 2026.
